name: inbounds_list
description: List inbound SMS messages received on your Sinch numbers with optional date range filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: service_plan_id
parameters.description: Your Sinch service plan ID (path parameter).

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Default 30, max 100.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter by the destination Sinch number.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date for filtering messages received on or after.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date for filtering messages received before.
